meta.title: Hudson Stands with Taiwan, Israel, and Ukraine
meta.description: With the passage of the foreign aid bills, Hudson is proud that America stands with Taiwan, Israel, and Ukraine. We will remain steadfast in promoting the security, freedom, and prosperity of America and its allies.
